pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 91: docker build -t acme-payment:latest; export_result.sh line 9: IMAGE_TAG="acme-payment:latest"
setup_task.sh lines 37-40 and 53-54: app.py requires these three environment variables; verifier.py extracts these from docker inspect
export_result.sh lines 55-57: checks for all three OCI labels; verifier.py lines 85-87 validates these
verifier.py line 111: passed = score >= 60; task.json line 26 defines pass_threshold as 60

privileged_info_summary: The docker_image_versioning task is a synthetic Docker image build exercise. The task requires students to modify a Dockerfile and build.sh script to inject Git metadata (APP_REVISION, APP_BRANCH, APP_BUILD_DATE) as environment variables and OCI labels (org.opencontainers.image.revision, org.opencontainers.image.source, org.opencontainers.image.created) into a Docker image. The project directory is /home/ga/projects/acme-payment-service, the target image tag is acme-payment:latest, the Flask endpoint is http://localhost:5000/version, and the passing threshold is a score of 60 or higher based on the verifier's evaluation criteria.
